main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'incorrect installation brine seal first element Tubo 5 + direct bypass feed to permeate' literal.

alternatives.justification: 5 alts (defect manufacturing, element orientation, biofouling, antiscalant dosing).

recommended_action.justification: Shutdown + isolate Tube 5 + remove 12 elements + verify brine seal each + reinstall documented — match gold.

requested_data.justification: Pide ΔP across first element Tube 5 vs adjacent — match parcial accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi: ΔP normal + conductividad >500 tras reinstalación → switch.
